status_notes: Initial sweep entry — not deeply researched. Note: a different, unrelated BIS (Bureau of Indian Standards) already exists in this registry under entity/in/gov/bis.json and control/in/gov/bis.json — this US bis.gov entry is a distinct organization sharing only the acronym.
notes: US Department of Commerce agency administering the Export Administration Regulations (EAR), including export controls on advanced computing items and AI model weights. See also registry/regulation/gov/bis.json for the export control regulation itself.
